# @tyravel/vector

Embedding storage and vector similarity search for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/vector
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.2` |
| Source | [`packages/vector`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/vector) |
| Category | AI & agents |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

- [@tyravel/cache](/reference/generated/packages/cache)
- [@tyravel/database](/reference/generated/packages/database)
- [@tyravel/queue](/reference/generated/packages/queue)
